name: Chocolate Cheesecake Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Whipped topping (thawed from freezer section in supermarket), baked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese, powdered sugar, and vanilla.
2. Stir in melted chocolate chips.
3. Mix well with whipped topping.
4. Spoon the cream cheese mixture into the pie crust.
5. Spread caramel topping evenly over the top of the pie.
6. Arrange toasted pecan halves on top.
7. Chill for a few hours before serving.
